revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:8 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:8月29日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 8월 29일]][[zh-min-nan:8 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:八月廿九]][[zh:八月廿九]]
{{Not to be confused with|August 29|qq=August 29}} <!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=八月廿九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 8월 29일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar August|qq=}} '''August 29''' is the 29th day of month {{ill|August (Lunisolar)|ja|8月 (旧暦)|lt=August (Hazuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/August (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 8th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小|qq=}} then this is the last day of the month. Otherwise if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大|qq=}} then it is the second last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11635368}} . == Events == * {{ill|Kōhei|en|Kōhei|qid=Q1193572|lt=Kōhei|1=Kōhei}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1058|en|1058|qid=Q19380|lt=1058|1=1058}} {{ill|September 19|en|September 19|qid=Q2896|lt=September 19|1=September 19}} ) – The era was changed from {{ill|Tengi|en|Tengi|qid=Q1193591|lt=Tenki|1=Tengi}} to {{ill|Kōhei|en|Kōhei|qid=Q1193572|lt=Kōhei|1=Kōhei}} . * {{ill|Gentoku|en|Gentoku|qid=Q1327385|lt=Gentoku|1=Gentoku}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1329|en|1329|qid=Q5894|lt=1329|1=1329}} {{ill|September 22|en|September 22|qid=Q2889|lt=September 22|1=September 22}} ) – Due to an epidemic, the era was changed from {{ill|Karyaku|en|Karyaku|qid=Q1327198|lt=Kareki|1=Karyaku}} to {{ill|Gentoku|en|Gentoku|qid=Q1327385|lt=Gentoku|1=Gentoku}} . * {{ill|Hōei|en|Hōei|qid=Q1145262|lt=Hōei|1=Hōei}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1708|en|1708|qid=Q6846|lt=1708|1=1708}} {{ill|October 12|en|October 12|qid=Q2920|lt=October 12|1=October 12}} ) – The Italian {{ill|Missionary|en|Missionary|qid=Q219477|lt=missionary|1=Missionary}} {{ill|Giovanni Sidotti|ja|ジョバンニ・シドッチ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Giovanni Sidotti|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ジョヴァンニ・バッティスタ・シドッティ|1=Giovanni Battista Sidotti|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q326973}} landed on {{ill|Yakushima|en|Yakushima|qid=Q242176|lt=Yakushima|1=Yakushima}} . He was soon captured and sent to Edo, where he was interrogated by {{ill|Arai Hakuseki|en|Arai Hakuseki|qid=Q467616|lt=Arai Hakuseki|1=Arai Hakuseki}} , who subsequently authored the ''{{ill|Seiyō Kibun|en|Seiyō Kibun|qid=Q3013516|lt=Western Records|1=Seiyō Kibun}} ''. == Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 7th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1579|en|1579|qid=Q6709|lt=1579|1=1579}} {{ill|September 19|en|September 19|qid=Q2896|lt=September 19|1=September 19}} ) – {{ill|Lady Tsukiyama|en|Lady Tsukiyama|qid=Q4415657|lt=Chikuyama-dono|1=Lady Tsukiyama}} , the principal consort of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|en|Tokugawa Ieyasu|qid=Q171977|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu|1=Tokugawa Ieyasu}} (born {{ill|1542|en|1542|qid=Q6520|lt=1542|1=1542}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 6th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1835|en|1835|qid=Q7597|lt=1835|1=1835}} {{ill|October 20|en|October 20|qid=Q2959|lt=October 20|1=October 20}} ) – {{ill|Tanomura Chikuden|en|Tanomura Chikuden|qid=Q1358543|lt=Tanonomura Takeda|1=Tanomura Chikuden}} , a member of the {{ill|Nanga (Japanese painting)|en|Nanga (Japanese painting)|qid=Q2928221|lt=Nanga|1=Nanga (Japanese painting)}} family (born {{ill|1777|en|1777|qid=Q7709|lt=1777|1=1777}} ).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|8|28|8|30|7|29|9|8|0829|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
